2026-04-15T04:13:30.9142524Z description: |
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9143028Z   Intelligent issue triage assistant that processes new issues
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9143986Z   Analyzes issue content, evaluates whether the author is a customer,
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9145712Z   predicts labels, looks up owners from CODEOWNERS, and provides
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9146509Z   analysis notes including debugging strategies and resource links
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9147324Z   Implements the initial issue triage rules for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9147835Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9147988Z on:
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9148314Z   issues:
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9148669Z     types: [opened]
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9149053Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9149435Z     inputs:
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9149786Z       issue_number:
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9150406Z         description: "Issue number to triage (used when dispatched from another workflow)"
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9151132Z         required: true
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9151520Z         type: string
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9151910Z   roles: all
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9152263Z   reaction: eyes
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9152490Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9152659Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9152909Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9153072Z network:
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9153409Z   allowed:
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9153758Z     - defaults
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9154133Z     - "api.nuget.org"
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9154374Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9154534Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9155307Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9155767Z   add-labels:
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9156116Z     max: 7
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9156459Z     target: "*"
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9156823Z   remove-labels:
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9157192Z     max: 7
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9157529Z     target: "*"
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9157891Z   add-comment:
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9158243Z     max: 2
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9158579Z     target: "*"
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9158943Z   assign-to-user:
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9159305Z     max: 1
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9159653Z     target: "*"
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9160016Z   close-issue:
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9160369Z     max: 1
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9160715Z     target: "*"
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9161095Z   noop:
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9161465Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9161890Z   jobs:
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9162237Z     mention_owners:
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9163164Z       description: "Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization"
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9164174Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9164870Z       output: "Owner mention comment posted"
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9165386Z       permissions:
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9165768Z         issues: write
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9166152Z       inputs:
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9167096Z         message:
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9168802Z           description: "The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols"
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9169490Z           required: true
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9169900Z           type: string
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9170285Z         owners:
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9171129Z           description: "Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')"
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9172262Z           required: true
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9172689Z           type: string
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9173153Z       steps:
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9173536Z         - name: Post mention comment
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9174029Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9174508Z           env:
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9175306Z             DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}"
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9175962Z           with:
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9176335Z             script: |
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9176732Z               const fs = require('fs');
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9177299Z               const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9177707Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9177901Z               function resolveIssueNumber() {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9178618Z                 if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9179342Z                   return context.issue.number;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9179830Z                 }
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9180366Z                 const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9181087Z                 if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9181644Z                   return parsed;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9182073Z                 }
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9182440Z                 return null;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9182857Z               }
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9183066Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9183291Z               const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9183856Z               const owner = context.repo.owner;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9184394Z               const repo = context.repo.repo;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9184887Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9185083Z               if (issueNumber === null) {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9186459Z                 core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9187791Z                 return;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9188168Z               }
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9188389Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9188672Z               async function failSafe(reason) {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9189251Z                 core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9189798Z                 try {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9190240Z                   await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9190821Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9191379Z                     labels: ['needs-team-triage']
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9191884Z                   });
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9192333Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9192930Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9194028Z                     body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9195093Z                   });
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9195506Z                 } catch (recoveryError) {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9196141Z                   core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9196752Z                 }
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9197140Z                 core.setFailed(reason);
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9197597Z               }
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9197814Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9197989Z               if (!outputFile) {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9198513Z                 await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9199063Z                 return;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9199446Z               }
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9199843Z               if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9200476Z                 await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9201089Z                 return;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9201470Z               }
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9201682Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9201856Z               let agentOutput;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9202399Z               try {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9202935Z                 agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9203664Z               } catch (parseError) {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9204313Z                 await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9205196Z                 return;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9205587Z               }
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9205796Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9206065Z               if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9206740Z                 await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9207318Z                 return;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9207704Z               }
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9207910Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9208272Z               const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9208997Z               if (items.length === 0) {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9209627Z                 await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9210216Z                 return;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9210598Z               }
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9210808Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9210993Z               for (const item of items) {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9211670Z                 if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9212484Z                   await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9213087Z                   return;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9213488Z                 }
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9213725Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9213943Z                 const mentions = item.owners
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9214479Z                   .split(/[\s,]+/)
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9215149Z                   .map(s => s.trim())
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9215663Z                   .filter(Boolean)
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9216157Z                   .map(raw => {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9216712Z                     const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9217359Z                     if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9218100Z                     if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9218793Z                     return `@${normalized}`;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9219305Z                   })
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9219700Z                   .filter(Boolean);
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9219999Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9220194Z                 if (mentions.length === 0) {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9220862Z                   await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9221500Z                   return;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9222387Z                 }
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9222636Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9222817Z                 const body = item.message
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9223382Z                   ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9223966Z                   : mentions.join(' ');
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9224299Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9224457Z                 try {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9225087Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9225685Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9226206Z                     body
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9226591Z                   });
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9227269Z                   core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9228052Z                 } catch (apiError) {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9228707Z                   await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9229390Z                   return;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9229793Z                 }
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9230240Z               }
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9230451Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9230607Z tools:
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9230946Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9231293Z   github:
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9231646Z     toolsets: [issues]
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9232285Z     # Triage must read issues from all users, including external
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9233085Z     # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9233773Z     # auto-applied "approved" policy filters them out via DIFC
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9234355Z     min-integrity: none
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9234605Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9234961Z timeout-minutes: 10

2026-04-15T04:13:30.9270616Z               function resolveIssueNumber() {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9271321Z                 if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9272056Z                   return context.issue.number;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9272535Z                 }
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9273081Z                 const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9273794Z                 if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9274352Z                   return parsed;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9277046Z                 }
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9277465Z                 return null;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9281677Z               }
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9281929Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9282166Z               const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9282748Z               const owner = context.repo.owner;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9283622Z               const repo = context.repo.repo;

2026-04-15T04:13:30.9287551Z               }
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9287760Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9287959Z               async function failSafe(reason) {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9288556Z                 core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9290731Z                 try {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9291265Z                   await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9291862Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9292419Z                     labels: ['needs-team-triage']
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9292930Z                   });
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9293388Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9293975Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9295332Z                     body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9297133Z                   });
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9297573Z                 } catch (recoveryError) {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9298206Z                   core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9299275Z                 }
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9299670Z                 core.setFailed(reason);
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9300130Z               }
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9300343Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9300518Z               if (!outputFile) {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9301276Z                 await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9301855Z                 return;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9302251Z               }
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9302913Z               if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9303585Z                 await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9304201Z                 return;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9304594Z               }
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9305008Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9305181Z               let agentOutput;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9305609Z               try {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9306339Z                 agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9307004Z               } catch (parseError) {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9307737Z                 await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9308592Z                 return;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9308983Z               }
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9309190Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9309465Z               if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9310139Z                 await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9310701Z                 return;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9311082Z               }
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9311298Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9311669Z               const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9312386Z               if (items.length === 0) {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9312979Z                 await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9313586Z                 return;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9313975Z               }
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9314183Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9314371Z               for (const item of items) {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9315245Z                 if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9316055Z                   await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9316662Z                   return;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9317058Z                 }
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9317271Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9317454Z                 const mentions = item.owners
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9317962Z                   .split(/[\s,]+/)
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9318424Z                   .map(s => s.trim())
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9318883Z                   .filter(Boolean)
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9319428Z                   .map(raw => {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9319918Z                     const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9320529Z                     if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9321257Z                     if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9321910Z                     return `@${normalized}`;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9322386Z                   })
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9323611Z                   .filter(Boolean);
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9323954Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9324153Z                 if (mentions.length === 0) {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9324988Z                   await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9325610Z                   return;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9326008Z                 }
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9326219Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9326403Z                 const body = item.message
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9326959Z                   ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9327529Z                   : mentions.join(' ');
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9327844Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9328004Z                 try {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9328467Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9329056Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9329581Z                     body
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9329985Z                   });
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9330672Z                   core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9331445Z                 } catch (apiError) {
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9332141Z                   await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9332873Z                   return;
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9333319Z                 }
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9333723Z               }
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9333955Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9334127Z tools:
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9334518Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9335098Z   github:
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9335484Z     toolsets: [issues]
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9336041Z     # Triage must read issues from all users, including external
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9336925Z     # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9337722Z     # auto-applied "approved" policy filters them out via DIFC
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9338318Z     min-integrity: none
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9338569Z 
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9338734Z timeout-minutes: 10
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9339302Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9339990Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (6762 chars):
2026-04-15T04:13:30.9372774Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Intelligent issue triage assistant that processes new issues\n  Analyzes issue content, evaluates whether the author is a customer,\n  predicts labels, looks up owners from CODEOWNERS, and provides\n  analysis notes including debugging strategies and resource links\n  Implements the initial issue triage rules for the Azure SDK repository\n\non:\n  issues:\n    types: [opened]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      issue_number:\n        description: \"Issue number to triage (used when dispatched from another workflow)\"\n        required: true\n        type: string\n  roles: all\n  reaction: eyes\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork:\n  allowed:\n    - defaults\n    - \"api.nuget.org\"\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  add-labels:\n    max: 7\n    target: \"*\"\n  remove-labels:\n    max: 7\n    target: \"*\"\n  add-comment:\n    max: 2\n    target: \"*\"\n  assign-to-user:\n    max: 1\n    target: \"*\"\n  close-issue:\n    max: 1\n    target: \"*\"\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    mention_owners:\n      description: \"Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      output: \"Owner mention comment posted\"\n      permissions:\n        issues: write\n      inputs:\n        message:\n          description: \"The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols\"\n          required: true\n          type: string\n        owners:\n          description: \"Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')\"\n          required: true\n          type: string\n      steps:\n        - name: Post mention comment\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const fs = require('fs');\n              const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;\n\n              function resolveIssueNumber() {\n                if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {\n                  return context.issue.number;\n                }\n                const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);\n                if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {\n                  return parsed;\n                }\n                return null;\n              }\n\n              const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();\n              const owner = context.repo.owner;\n              const repo = context.repo.repo;\n\n              if (issueNumber === null) {\n                core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              async function failSafe(reason) {\n                core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);\n                try {\n                  await github.rest.issues.addLabels({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    labels: ['needs-team-triage']\n                  });\n                  await github.rest.issues.createComment({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'\n                  });\n                } catch (recoveryError) {\n                  core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);\n                }\n                core.setFailed(reason);\n              }\n\n              if (!outputFile) {\n                await failSafe('No agent output path provided');\n                return;\n              }\n              if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {\n                await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              let agentOutput;\n              try {\n                agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));\n              } catch (parseError) {\n                await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {\n                await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');\n              if (items.length === 0) {\n                await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              for (const item of items) {\n                if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {\n                  await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                const mentions = item.owners\n                  .split(/[\\s,]+/)\n                  .map(s => s.trim())\n                  .filter(Boolean)\n                  .map(raw => {\n                    const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\\\?@/, '');\n                    if (/\\r|\\n/.test(normalized)) return null;\n                    if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;\n                    return `@${normalized}`;\n                  })\n                  .filter(Boolean);\n\n                if (mentions.length === 0) {\n                  await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                const body = item.message\n                  ? `${item.message}\\n\\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`\n                  : mentions.join(' ');\n\n                try {\n                  await github.rest.issues.createComment({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    body\n                  });\n                  core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);\n                } catch (apiError) {\n                  await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);\n                  return;\n                }\n              }\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues]\n    # Triage must read issues from all users, including external\n    # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the\n    # auto-applied \"approved\" policy filters them out via DIFC\n    min-integrity: none\n\ntimeout-minutes: 10"}
